description_long: This coupe car features a striking metallic green body with bold, sweeping black, red, and turquoise graphics along the sides and hood. The vehicle has a low, aerodynamic profile with a wide stance, accentuated by two prominent gold engine domes on the rear deck. The front end is sleek, with narrow headlights and a smooth, rounded bumper, while the rear is characterized by a pair of stylized fins and a dual exhaust setup. The wheels are black with metallic accents, and the side panels display intricate vent and intake details. The cockpit area is compact, with a gold-accented interior visible through the open roof sections. Overall, the design is futuristic and performance-oriented, reminiscent of concept or fantasy racing cars.
description: A metallic green, futuristic coupe car with gold engine domes, bold graphics, and a low, aerodynamic profile. The design features stylized fins, black wheels, and intricate side detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, low nose, narrow headlights, and gold engine domes set behind the cockpit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sweeping graphics, black wheels, and the pronounced gold engine domes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the stylized fins, dual exhausts, and the symmetry of the gold engine domes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible graphics, wheel design, and aerodynamic contours.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
